integrationPolicy.rule: Every mapped capability must define implementation owner, acceptance signal, and telemetry proof.
No capability marked complete without deterministic test evidence.

category.name: ClientLifecycle

sdkCapabilities.capability: start stop forceStop autoStart autoRestart connection state transitions
stdio and tcp transport modes with cliPath and cliUrl

implementationPlan.item: Create runtime client manager with explicit transition graph and restart policy profiles.
Expose transport policy per environment profile and pipeline override.

category.evidence: State transition logs, reconnection tests, protocol compatibility checks.

category.name: SessionLifecycle

sdkCapabilities.capability: create resume list delete send sendAndWait abort model switch message retrieval

implementationPlan.item: Build session orchestration service with lifecycle contracts and idempotent resume semantics.
Link session identifiers to pipeline and artifact traces.

category.evidence: Lifecycle conformance suite and session replay verification.

category.name: ToolsHooksPermissions

sdkCapabilities.capability: defineTool callbacks, hook lifecycle callbacks, permission request handling
pending tool call response flow and explicit deny kinds

implementationPlan.item: Unify tool hook permission routing behind policy engine with deterministic ordering.
Require schema validation before handler execution.
Capture decision rationale for every allow deny action.

category.evidence: Policy gate tests, audit trail snapshots, error path assertions.

category.name: AgentsSkillsModes

sdkCapabilities.capability: custom agents, agent selection, skillDirectories, disabledSkills, mode controls

implementationPlan.item: Introduce capability profiles per agent and mode-aware pipeline templates.
Implement signed skill manifest checks and loader precedence policy.

category.evidence: Agent switch traces, skill conflict tests, mode behavior snapshots.

category.name: MCPIntegration

sdkCapabilities.capability: local and remote MCP server configuration and tool routing

implementationPlan.item: Create MCP connector manager with trust levels, health checks, timeout policy, and fallback routing.
Add MCP capability discovery cache with invalidation strategy.

category.evidence: MCP outage simulation tests and routing correctness metrics.

category.name: ModelsProvidersBYOK

sdkCapabilities.capability: models list provider config BYOK reasoning effort controls

implementationPlan.item: Create provider abstraction with secret references and environment-based resolution.
Apply model and reasoning policies per task complexity and risk class.

category.evidence: Provider policy tests and model selection telemetry.

category.name: EventsObservabilityReplay

sdkCapabilities.capability: rich session events, usage signals, compaction lifecycle, replay harness patterns

implementationPlan.item: Implement normalized event envelope with correlation IDs and parent links.
Adopt replay-first E2E architecture with deterministic snapshots.

category.evidence: Replay pass rate, event ordering checks, anomaly detector reports.
